message:
test(net): WebSocket assembler + config tests, HTTP formatting cleanup (bd-2hvn)

WebSocket client (136 lines added):
- message_assembler_rejects_double_data_frame: starting new data frame
  during fragmented message returns ProtocolViolation
- message_assembler_continuation_exceeds_max_size: total payload across
  fragments exceeds limit returns PayloadTooLarge
- config_defaults: verify WebSocketConfig default values
- config_connect_timeout_builder: None and Some timeout variants
- ws_connect_error_display: TlsRequired, Cancelled, Io error formatting
- message_constructors: text, binary, ping, pong factory methods

WebSocket frame (95 lines added):
- Additional frame encoding/decoding edge case tests

WebSocket server (45 lines added):
- Server-side handshake validation tests

HTTP h1 client + http_client:
- Formatting cleanup: struct variants, long lines, and method signatures
  reformatted by rustfmt (no behavioral changes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
